data.content: Implemented scan fallback for versioned ChatGPT binaries (e.g., chatgpt-5.1/chatgpt5), selecting the highest discovered version while keeping canonical id chatgpt. Updated settings scan tests and coverage mocks; added test for versioned fallback behavior. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
